description: Grey waist pouch with branding at frontPadded waist straps with a click clasp closure, a haul loop and a detachable sling strapOne main zipped compartment with a padded sleeve insideOne external zipped pocket in the front with an inner zipped pocketTwo mesh, stash pockets at the sides with elasticated mouthHas a padded backWarranty: 5 years against manufacturing defectsPlease note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shown
